name: Quick Beef Quiche for Two
recipeIngredient: 1 Package frozen green beans, (9 ounces), thawed (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook the beef, green onion, basil, and salt until the beef is browned; drain.
2. Lightly grease an 8-inch quiche or pie plate.
3. Place the beef mixture and green beans in the quiche plate.
4. Mix the biscuit baking mix, milk, and eggs.
5. Pour over the beef mixture.
6. Sprinkle with cheese if desired.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes.
